reviews.review_description:
This is a truly amazing music visualizer. The visuals and color schemes included are mesmerizing; hopefully there will be more added through updates. There are many great songs included, from various genres.

I've only explored a bit of this app so far, but in my searching, I wasn't able to find a way to listen to streaming services. Not sure if it's possible, but connecting my Spotify account (yes, I realize that there might be licensing issues) would bring this over the top. Is this possible?

The hand tracking works fairly well, although it often takes a couple of presses on a button to select it. I wasn't able to switch through songs or scenes by swiping, which was shown in the intro video.

Is there an available Discord channel? I'd love to chat with the dev(s) about some ideas for Glitter Dark. Overall, it's an incredibly immersive experience so far. I'm excited to learn more about it as I use it more.
